description_long: This object is a vintage television set with a wooden exterior casing and a boxy, rectangular shape. The front features a convex glass screen displaying a classic color test pattern, bordered by a thick, dark brown bezel. To the right of the screen, there is a speaker grille and a vertical arrangement of two large rotary dials, along with several small push buttons below. The top of the television has two thin, metallic V-shaped antenna rods extending upward. The back panel is solid and dark, with a set of ventilation holes and a slightly protruding section. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century analog televisions, with a sturdy, retro aesthetic.
description: A vintage, box-shaped television with a wooden exterior, glass screen, rotary dials, and metal antennae, featuring a classic test pattern display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass screen with a color test pattern, speaker grille, rotary dials, and control buttons.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the wooden casing and the protruding screen, with antennae visible on top.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid dark back panel with ventilation holes and a protruding section, as well as the antennae.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the plain wooden casing and the depth of the television.
attribute_bezel_design: Thick, dark brown wooden bezel with a rectangular profile and retro styling.
attribute_control_button_layout: Cluster of two large rotary dials and several small buttons on the lower right front panel.
